calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Continued To Jan-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-17-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Elan Wick, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (611)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff/Respondent Gilbert Nilest is present In Pro Per.
Plaintiff's witness Robert Low.
Defendant/Appellant Fred T. Santiago is present In Pro Per.

This matter comes on calendar for a Trial De Novo. Both of the litigants as well as the witness have been affirmed by the clerk. The court hears testimony, reviews plaintiff's exhibits and reviews newly submitted defense exhibits.

The following defense exhibits are marked;
Ex. 1 - Summary of Property Damage, 9 pages.
Ex. 2 - 20 photos of property, 10 pages.

After hearing all testimony, the court takes the matter under submission.

1/17/08 - JUDGMENT ENTERED

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Judgment Entered
